families.notes: Prebuild: glyphs2ufo generates .ufo masters from .glyphspackage
Phase 1 test. 6 differing tables (GDEF, GPOS, GSUB, glyf, head, name).
Roman VF builds successfully. Italic excluded due to cu2qu master incompatibility (kaiSymbol, kappa.sups glyphs).
Cohort 0.9.98 test: custom isolation did not achieve byte-identical (compiler-version)
Build fails with current toolchain. Needs matched tool versions.
Build fails with current toolchain. Needs matched tool versions.
Tarball bloated by build-env (python venv). Sources extracted from local git clone.
Phase 2. Single static TTF. 10 differing tables including DSIG.
Prebuild: glyphs2ufo generates .ufo masters from .glyphspackage
Build fails with current toolchain (qcurve overlaps). Needs older fonttools.
Build fails with current toolchain (Illegal line segment point count). Needs older fonttools/ufo2ft version.
Build fails with current toolchain (Illegal line segment point count). Needs older fonttools/ufo2ft version.
Multiple corrupt plist structures (bare keys in arrays, missing values). Prebuild rewrites lib.plist with only glyphOrder.
Prebuild: comment out references to undefined glyph classes in features.fea
Config uses ../Big-Shoulders/ paths that resolve incorrectly
Expanded instances deactivated in source. Prebuild: activate wdth=125 instances, deactivate wdth=100, rename family.
Prebuild fixes quoted descender values. 4/7 instances match by name; 3 have different names (Heavy→Black, UltraLight→ExtraLight, DemiBold→SemiBold) but build succeeds.
Upstream repo ships pre-built variable fonts; gftools-builder cannot build from template designspace
Upstream repo ships pre-built variable fonts; gftools-builder cannot build from template designspace
Upstream repo ships pre-built variable fonts; gftools-builder cannot build from template designspace
No source directory found
Glyphs have empty com.typemytype.robofont.layerData key (key without value). Prebuild removes them.
Two fixes: 1) close 33 open contours that break RemoveOverlaps, 2) remove U+0069 duplicate cmap from Idotaccent/I glyphs.
Same source as bungeecolor with different familyName. Three fixes: close contours, rename family, fix cmap.
Prebuild: glyphs2ufo generates .ufo from .glyphs for both roman and italic
Prebuild: makenormal.py strips Color layers from .glyphs for non-color build
Prebuild: same as cairo (shared repo)
Prebuild: comment out all missing Devanagari glyph refs in features.fea
SFD source only - gftools crashes at _do_smallcap trying to open .sfd with ufoLib2
SFD source only - gftools crashes at _do_smallcap trying to open .sfd with ufoLib2
Cascadia Mono is built from the same sources as Cascadia Code but with ligatures removed. Upstream uses a custom build.py; this prebuild transforms the sources for gftools-builder.
Build fails with current toolchain. Needs matched tool versions.
Prebuild: remove duplicate unicode from SngStory variant glyphs in source and JSON UFOs
Heavy UFO: missing dblgravecmb + cmap collision on U+0326. Prebuild creates placeholder glyph and removes duplicate mapping.
VFB source only - gftools cannot build .vfb files (requires FontLab conversion)
Build fails with current toolchain. Needs matched tool versions.
Source builds Comfortaa[wdth,wght] but shipped is Comfortaa[wght] - width axis needs to be removed or file mapping needed
Config references .ufo files but only .sfd sources exist. Needs SFD->UFO conversion.
Phase 2. Variable .glyphs, config named build.yaml. 14-15 differing tables.

Requires babelfont 3.1.2 to regenerate .glyphs sources before build. Upstream requirements.txt + babelfont override. 18/20 tables match (gvar has 19 bytes IUP optimization diff, head has timestamp diff).
Phase 2. Static 6 files. 16 differing tables across all weights.
qcurve segments cause overlap removal failure in uni25CC
VFB source only - gftools cannot build .vfb files (requires FontLab conversion)
fonttools 4.56.0+ strips all-zero gvar variation tuples for composites (circumflex, caron, breve, etc.) — 4.55.x preserves them, matching the reference. Boundary: 4.55.8 works, 4.56.0 breaks.
VFB source only - gftools cannot build .vfb files (requires FontLab conversion)

Build succeeds but gftools-fix crashes: fix_colr_v1_add_svg calls maximum_color (nanoemoji) which fails on COLR v1 Paint Format 5 (PaintLinearGradient). The shipped font has COLR v1 but no SVG table. No config option exists to skip the SVG fallback generation fix step.
Build fails with current toolchain. Needs matched tool versions.
Prebuild: add instances to designspace + symlink features dir for instance UFOs
Prebuild: remove LLa from contents.plist (glif file missing)
HeptaSlab has 4 masters with bracket layers. 19 glyphs have incompatible contour structures between light/heavy masters. Prebuild replaces base glyphs with compatible bracket alternates.
VFB source only - gftools cannot build .vfb files (requires FontLab conversion)
VFB source only - gftools cannot build .vfb files (requires FontLab conversion)
Build fails with current toolchain. Needs matched tool versions.

families.notes: Prebuild: fix instances, axis mapping, string kerning values, and string descender in Kalam.glyphs
SP3 source only - no modern build pipeline support
VFB source only - gftools cannot build .vfb files (requires FontLab conversion)
Phase 2. Variable 3-axis .glyphspackage. 12-13 differing tables.
Phase 2. Variable .glyphs. 20 differing tables.
Massive build (599 steps) with includeSubsets. Likely timeout.
Procedurally generated font — sources are Python scripts, not .glyphs/.ufo. Fonts shipped from release archive (archive_url). No standard build pipeline possible.
Single master with degenerate wght+wdth axes. Prebuild removes axes.
Single master with degenerate wght/wdth axes and 12 subset instances. Only need main NotoSansTifinagh. Prebuild strips axes and extra instances.
Large build (515 steps). Likely timeout.

Prebuild fixes: (1) remove duplicate smart component layers with timestamp suffixes, (2) add missing smart component axis mappings to partSelection blocks, (3) fix wrong pole values causing duplicate locations. After prebuild, build still fails with glyph compatibility errors: ~50 glyphs have differing contour/component counts across optical size masters (bhook, bstroke, q, u, many Cyrillic glyphs). Both Roman and Italic affected. Source at commit 80a3341 requires Glyphs 3 smart component resolution that fontmake/glyphsLib cannot reproduce.
Same upstream source as playfairdisplay (clauseggers/Playfair). Same build failures apply. See playfairdisplay notes.
Phase 2. AssertionError: Default source not found in Devanagari .glyphs. glyphsLib version incompatibility.
SFD source requires FontForge for conversion. babelfont cannot read this format.
Phase 2. Static 14 files .designspace+.ufo. Only 4-5 differing tables (OS/2, glyf, head, name) — closest to matching.
Roman VF builds successfully (metadata-only diff). Italic excluded due to incompatible masters.
Build succeeds but produces [opsz,wdth,wght]. Shipped font has [opsz,slnt,wdth,wght]. slnt axis requires upstream preprocessing script (scripts/build/glyphsToUFO.py) to generate oblique masters.
SFD source requires FontForge for conversion. babelfont cannot read this format.
